scope.goal: Review and close AIC-007 with complete evidence and backlog resolution.
scope.target: Tooling diff, validators, workflow tasks, backlog/index state
constraints: Do not close on warning-only proof

architecture_decisions: Backlog resolves only after implementation verification

steps: Re-run all validators and mutation probes

results.summary: Completed fallback-mode tooling review, remediated the single MUST FIX manifest-to-runner parity finding, passed independent re-review with no blockers, resolved backlog AIC-007, and closed the workflow with explicit platform and commit-history exceptions.
validation_evidence: independent tooling review and closure audit completed

real critical and quick gates pass
